task_description: Major improvements to the Anime Guide Engine: (1) UI/UX overhaul with vibrant anime-themed design, animations, and modern aesthetics, (2) Search bar functionality with database-backed API, (3) Pagination on listing pages, (4) Complete watch order system that traverses the full franchise relation graph.

verification.summary: npm run build completes successfully with 611 static pages generated, 2 dynamic API routes (/api/search, /api/anime), no TypeScript errors. No test framework configured in project. Semantic review issues addressed (unbounded limit, search input cap, duplicate count, mobile nav, AbortController).
